items.title: One last Raptors minor roster item: The deadline time has come and past and the contract of Jamison Battle (about $2.3 million for '26-27) is now guaranteed
items.author: Doug Smith

items.title: Jamison Battle's contract with the Toronto Raptors becomes fully guaranteed for $2.3M if he's not waived today.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt: Jamison Battle's contract with the Toronto Raptors becomes fully guaranteed for $2.3M if he's not waived today.
